_comment: Adjudicated cross-ref decisions (see docs/crossref.md). per_topic[slug][surface] and global[category-or-*][surface] map an ambiguous surface string to a link target or null (= never link here). Written mostly by the /crossref adjudication agent; the '*' seeds below are hand-picked always-ambiguous surfaces (bare first/last names and common nouns) — a per-topic entry can still override any of them.
